description: The soil texture reported by a laboratory test.
probe_semantics: Deliver the soil texture string recorded on the subject lab test (the log's soil_texture), or an empty value when none was recorded.

when: record_log of kind lab_test against the land asset with soil_texture set to a texture string
then: soil_texture of the lab test log == the recorded texture
soil_texture of a second lab test log recorded with no soil_texture == the empty value

punts: kind='assertion' guessed deterministically from gap_kind='bundle_field'; field declared in a PHP attribute plugin's buildFieldDefinitions, not a YAML file

the field is a plain string with no closed vocabulary in the source, so the recorded value is a free string delivered verbatim by the boundary (validated live: 'Loam' delivered unchanged) — not gated against any glossary set
subject is a lab_test LOG (subject_kind=event); the value read is the log's soil_texture attribute, delivered verbatim
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
